pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java compiler source and target properties from 1.8 to 11 to support JDK 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails or produces incompatible bytecode if source/target levels remain at 1.8 while migrating to JDK 11 features or runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace maven.compiler.source/target with maven-compiler-plugin release configuration for JDK 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in JDK 9+ and may cause warnings or errors; 'release' is the standard for cross-compilation in modern JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) dependencies to support modern testing framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 API is not compatible with JUnit 5 test runners and annotations; tests will fail to compile or run without the new dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JUnit Platform Launcher dependency required for running JUnit 5 tests via Maven Surefire.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 5 tests require the platform launcher to be present on the classpath for discovery and execution by Surefire plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire plugin to version 2.22.0 to ensure compatibility with JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Surefire do not support JUnit 5 test execution out of the box without additional configuration or adapters.

pom.xml.general_idea: Refactor project structure from a single maven-plugin module to a multi-module POM project.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project structure changed significantly, requiring a parent POM to manage modules; the old single-module configuration is invalid for the new structure.
